input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.12.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.12.3
            TITLE: for double lug joints, each lug must:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.12.3: For Double Lug Joints, each lug must:
F.5.12.3 For Double Lug Joints, each lug must: 
a. Be minimum 4.5 mm (0.177 in) thickness steel 
b. Measure 25 mm minimum perpendicular to the axis of the bracing 
c. Be as short as practical along the axis of the bracing.

final_answer: For Double Lug Joints, each lug must: a. Be minimum 4.5 mm (0.177 in) thickness steel b. Measure 25 mm minimum perpendicular to the axis of the bracing c. Be as short as practical along the axis of the bracing.
